issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as permission errors or region mismatches.

scenarios.name: Safe canary rollout of new revision
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses --no-traffic deploy then update-traffic --to-revisions with explicit percentages and --to-latest promotion; baseline omits the no-traffic+revision-pinning canary pattern.

scenarios.name: Migrate Kafka consumer off a VM
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses gcloud run worker-pools deploy with min-instances=1, the documented use case for pull-based work; baseline reaches for Cloud Run services or GKE instead of worker pools.
